flags.message: Snapshot is nearly empty: no docket entries, no docket number, no filing/argument/termination dates, no parties or panel. Only the caption and one opinion cluster are present, so the prediction rests on corpus base rates rather than case facts.

This looks like a historical (19th-century) SCOTUS merits appeal, not a modern cert petition: cert-lifecycle fields are all null yet an opinion cluster exists. The granted/denied semantics of a petition-disposition event do not map cleanly onto an affirm/reverse merits outcome, which this corpus appears to label 'other'.
